dashboard.label: Splunk Cloud & External Setup Guide
dashboard.description: Step-by-step instructions for installing this app on Splunk Cloud or Splunk Enterprise when OrchestraACME runs without the local Splunk container.

panel.html:
OrchestraACME → Splunk Cloud Installation

Use this guide when your telemetry lands in Splunk Cloud or an external Splunk Enterprise instance instead of the local Docker Splunk container.

Step 1 — Package & Install This App

  1. On your OrchestraACME host, build the install package:
    ./scripts/package_splunk_app.sh
  2. Download dist/acme_genai_compliance-2.0.0.tar.gz
  3. In Splunk Cloud: Apps → Browse more apps → Upload app (or ask your Splunk Cloud admin)
  4. In Splunk Enterprise: Apps → Manage Apps → Install app from file

Step 2 — Create Index & HEC Token (Splunk Cloud Admin)

  1. Settings → Indexes → New Index
    Name: acme_agentic_telemetry (or your preferred name)
  2. Settings → Data Inputs → HTTP Event Collector → New Token
    • Name: orchestra-acme-otel
    • Source type: otel:agentic:json
    • Index: acme_agentic_telemetry
  3. Copy the HEC token and your Cloud endpoint URL
    Format: https://http-inputs-<stack>.splunkcloud.com:443/services/collector/event

Step 3 — Point OrchestraACME OTel Collector at Splunk Cloud

Edit .env on the OrchestraACME Docker host:

SPLUNK_MODE=external
SPLUNK_HEC_ENDPOINT=https://http-inputs-YOUR_STACK.splunkcloud.com/services/collector/event
SPLUNK_HEC_TOKEN=YOUR_SPLUNK_CLOUD_HEC_TOKEN
SPLUNK_HEC_INDEX=acme_agentic_telemetry
SPLUNK_HEC_SOURCETYPE=otel:agentic:json
SPLUNK_HEC_TLS_SKIP_VERIFY=false

Restart without the local Splunk container:

docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external.yml up --build -d

Step 4 — Configure App Macros (if using a custom index)

If your index or sourcetype differs from defaults, edit:

Settings → Advanced Search → Search macros → acme_genai_index

Default definition:

index=acme_agentic_telemetry sourcetype="otel:agentic:json"

Step 5 — Verify Ingestion

index=acme_agentic_telemetry sourcetype="otel:agentic:json" | head 20

Optional — Machine Learning Toolkit

Install Splunk Machine Learning Toolkit from Splunkbase for advanced forecasting panels. Core compliance dashboards work without MLTK.

Splunk Cloud Notes

  • Private apps must be approved by your Splunk Cloud admin.
  • HEC tokens require the hec capability on the token or role.
  • Index creation requires admin privileges on Splunk Cloud.
  • This app does not require a local Splunk container — only HEC ingest + app install.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` | stats max(_time) as latest_epoch | eval latest=strftime(latest_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table latest
